'''''Bardictol''''' was a [[Habassa]]n [[Delta-class DX-9 stormtrooper transport]] that carried the Habassan envoy to the [[Independence/Legends|''Independence'']] in order to attain a diplomatic meeting with the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]

Due to their involvement in previous assistance operations, the Habassa asked the ''Bardictol'' to be escorted by [[Red Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Red Squadron]].

{{Ship-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Tour of Duty: B-Wing]]'' {{1st}}
